title: Toggle Perspective Fix
description: Fixes the issue with toggle perspective keybind not working with mouse buttons
body:
**Toggle Perspective Fix** is a mod that addresses a persistent bug found in the vanilla Minecraft game version 1.8.9. This bug specifically affects the functionality of the toggle perspective keybind when it is bound to a mouse button.

In the vanilla game, players can assign the toggle perspective action to a mouse button to switch between first-person and third-person views. However, due to a bug, the toggle perspective feature fails to function correctly until a keyboard event is received. This means that if the keybind is assigned to a mouse button, players cannot switch perspectives smoothly until they trigger a keyboard event first.

Toggle Perspective Fix mod solves this long-standing issue by correcting the bug associated with the toggle perspective keybind when it is bound to a mouse button. Once installed, the mod ensures that players can seamlessly switch between first-person and third-person views using the assigned mouse button without requiring any additional keyboard input.

With Toggle Perspective Fix, Minecraft players can enjoy a more streamlined and hassle-free perspective switching experience, enhancing their gameplay immersion.

**Note:** This mod is designed specifically for Minecraft version 1.8.9 and requires the Forge Mod Loader to be installed for compatibility.
